title: Large Milano Tall Flared Black Planter Square Plastic Garden Flower Plant Pot Gloss Finish - for Indoor and Ourdoor (Pack of 1)
features: {MODERN FLAIR} The stylish tall flared design of the Rammento 44cm Tall Black Plastic Plant Pot adds a contemporary touch to any space, seamlessly blending with both modern and traditional decor.
{PERFECT DIMENSIONS} With dimensions of 44cm in height and 29.5cm in width and length, this square planter offers ample room for a diverse range of plants, from vibrant flowers to lush greenery.
{VERSATILE PLANTING OPTIONS} Designed for versatility, this planter is ideal for indoor and outdoor use, allowing you to beautify your home, garden, patio, or balcony with ease.

{DURABLE & LOW MAINTENANCE} Made from glossy black plastic, not only does this planter boast a chic look, but it also ensures durability and easy maintenance, standing up to all weather conditions without losing its lustre.
{WEATHER-RESISTANT DESIGN} Crafted to withstand the elements, this garden pot is weather-resistant, ensuring longevity and robustness, making it a reliable choice for your planting needs year-round.
description: Product description Rammento 44cm Tall Flared Black Plastic Plant Pot The Rammento 44cm Tall Flared Black Plastic Plant Pot is a statement piece that marries form and function in a sleek, modern design. This large, square, glossy black planter is a versatile choice, equally stunning indoors or as a welcoming sight at your front door. The durable glossy black plastic material not only ensures longevity but also offers ease of maintenance. Its weather-resistant quality guarantees that the planter can withstand any weather conditions, making it a robust home for your plants year-round. Its stylish tall flared design elevates the look of any space, bringing a modern touch to your home, garden, or balcony. This planter is perfect for showcasing a variety of plants, from vibrant flowers to lush greenery, making it a versatile addition to your planting endeavours. The large 44cm size provides ample space for plant growth, allowing you to create stunning floral or foliage arrangements. Whether you're a gardening enthusiast looking to display your plants in style or seeking to add a touch of elegance to your décor, the Rammento Black Plastic Plant Pot is an ideal choice. Key Features: Large 44cm square planter in glossy black Durable and easy-to-maintain plastic material The stylish tall flared design adds a modern touch Versatile for both indoor and outdoor planting Weather-resistant, designed for longevity and robustness Specification: Material: Glossy Black Plastic Dimensions: H: 44cm/17.32", W: 29.5cm/11.61", L: 29.5cm/11.61" Weight: 0.79kg Per Planter Includes: 1x 44cm Tall Black Plastic Plant Pot Legal Disclaimer Large Milano Planter, Made In UK
